name: Wash
description: Watercolor swatches pooling into one another on cold-press paper — every redraw floats the pigment into new puddles.

code.style: --pig1: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color5)); --pig2: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: @rand(52%, 84%); left: @rand(-4%, 24%); top: @rand(-4%, 24%); border-radius: @rand(36%, 64%) @rand(36%, 64%) @rand(36%, 64%) @rand(36%, 64%); background: var(--pig1); opacity: @rand(0.32, 0.55); mix-blend-mode: multiply; filter: blur(calc(8px / @Y)); transition: ease 900ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: @rand(40%, 66%); left: @rand(28%, 50%); top: @rand(28%, 50%); border-radius: @rand(36%, 64%) @rand(36%, 64%) @rand(36%, 64%) @rand(36%, 64%); background: var(--pig2); opacity: @rand(0.3, 0.5); mix-blend-mode: multiply; filter: blur(calc(8px / @Y)); transition: ease 900ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
